metadata.title: Latex Suite
metadata.description: Make typesetting LaTeX math as fast as handwriting through snippets, text expansion, and editor enhancements

regex.source: description: "Add space after hyperbolic trig funcs"
regex.target: description: "双曲三角函数后加空格"
.setName("代码片段文件或文件夹位置")
Notice(`解析代码片段文件${file.name}失败：${e}`)

regex.source: Notice(`Failed to load snippet variables from settings: ${e}`)
regex.target: Notice(`从设置中加载代码片段变量失败：${e}`)

regex.source: Notice(`Failed to load snippets from settings: ${e}`)
regex.target: Notice(`从设置中加载代码片段失败：${e}`)

regex.source: .log(`Failed to load snippet variables from settings: ${e}`)
regex.target: .log(`从设置中加载代码片段变量失败：${e}`)
.log(`从设置中加载代码片段失败：${e}`)

regex.source: description: "Add space after trig funcs. Skips letter h to allow sinh, cosh, etc."
regex.target: description: "三角函数后加空格。跳过字母h以支持sinh、cosh等双曲函数。"

regex.source: .setText("Make equations more readable by hiding LaTeX syntax and instead displaying it in a pretty format.")
regex.target: .setText("隐藏LaTeX语法，以美观格式显示公式，提升可读性。")

regex.source: .setText("LaTeX beneath the cursor will be revealed.")
regex.target: .setText("光标下方的LaTeX代码将显示出来。")

regex.source: .setText("Disabled by default to not confuse new users. However, I recommend turning this on once you are comfortable with the plugin!")
regex.target: .setText("默认禁用以防新用户混淆。但熟悉插件后，建议开启此功能！")

regex.source: .setText("How long to delay the reveal of LaTeX for, in milliseconds, when the cursor moves over LaTeX. Defaults to 0 (LaTeX under the cursor is revealed immediately).")
regex.target: .setText("光标移过LaTeX时，延迟多久显示代码（毫秒）。默认0毫秒（光标下的LaTeX立即显示）。")

regex.source: .setText("Can be set to a positive number, e.g. 300, to delay the reveal of LaTeX, making it much easier to navigate equations using arrow keys.")
regex.target: .setText("可设为正数（如300）延迟显示LaTeX，使用方向键导航公式时更顺畅。")

regex.source: .setText("When inside an equation, show a popup preview window of the rendered math.")
regex.target: .setText("在公式内时，显示渲染后数学公式的弹窗预览。")

regex.source: .setText("The popup preview will be shown for all inline math equations, as well as for block math equations in Source mode.")
regex.target: .setText("弹窗预览将显示所有行内公式，以及源代码模式下的块级公式。")
.setName("从文件或文件夹加载代码片段")

regex.source: .setName("Load snippet variables from file or folder")
regex.target: .setName("从文件或文件夹加载代码片段变量")
.setName("代码片段变量文件或文件夹位置")

regex.source: .setName("Remove trailing whitespaces in snippets in inline math")
regex.target: .setName("移除行内公式中代码片段的尾随空格")

regex.source: .setName("Remove closing $ when backspacing inside blank inline math")
regex.target: .setName("在空白行内公式中回退时移除闭合$")

regex.source: .setName("Don't trigger snippets when IME is active")
.setName("Code languages to interpret as math mode")
.setDesc('Enter snippets here.  Remember to add a comma after each snippet, and escape all backslashes with an extra \\. Lines starting with "//" will be treated as comments and ignored.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在此输入代码片段。每个片段后需加逗号，反斜杠需用额外反斜杠转义（\\）。以"//"开头的行视为注释，将被忽略。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to load snippets from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).")
regex.target: .setDesc('是否从指定文件或文件夹内所有文件加载代码片段（而非从插件设置中加载）。')

regex.source: .setDesc("What key to press to expand non-auto snippets.")
regex.target: .setDesc("按下哪个键来展开非自动代码片段。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When the cursor is adjacent to a bracket, highlight the matching bracket.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当光标邻近括号时，高亮显示配对的括号。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Where to display the popup preview relative to the equation source.")
regex.target: .setDesc("弹窗预览相对于公式源代码的显示位置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The fraction symbol to use in the replacement. e.g. \\frac, \\dfrac, \\tfrac")
regex.target: .setDesc("替换时使用的分式符号。例如：\\frac、\\dfrac、\\tfrac")

regex.source: .setDesc('A list of environments to exclude auto-fraction from running in. For example, to exclude auto-fraction from running while inside an exponent, such as e^{...}, use  ["^{", "}"]')
regex.target: .setDesc('排除自动分式功能的环境列表。例如，要在指数（如e^{...}）内禁用自动分式，可填写 ["^{", "}"]')

regex.source: .setDesc('A list of characters that denote the start/end of a fraction. e.g. if + is included in the list, "a+b/c" will expand to "a+\\frac{b}{c}". If + is not in the list, it will expand to "\\frac{a+b}{c}".')
regex.target: .setDesc('表示分式起止的字符列表。例如，若列表包含+，则"a+b/c"会扩展为"a+\\frac{b}{c}"；若不包含+，则扩展为"\\frac{a+b}{c}"。')

regex.source: .setDesc("A list of environment names to run the matrix shortcuts in, separated by commas.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用矩阵快捷键的环境名称列表，用逗号分隔。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to automatically enlarge brackets containing e.g. sum, int, frac.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否自动放大包含sum、int、frac等的括号。")

regex.source: .setDesc("A list of symbols that should trigger auto-enlarge brackets, separated by commas.")
regex.target: .setDesc("触发括号自动放大的符号列表，用逗号分隔。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Assign snippet variables that can be used as shortcuts when writing snippets.")
regex.target: .setDesc("定义代码片段变量，可作为编写代码片段时的快捷方式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to load snippet variables from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).")
regex.target: .setDesc('是否从指定文件或文件夹内所有文件加载代码片段变量（而非从插件设置中加载）。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Symbols that will be treated as word delimiters, for use with the "w" snippet option.')
regex.target: .setDesc('视为单词分隔符的符号，用于代码片段的"w"选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to remove trailing whitespaces when expanding snippets at the end of inline math blocks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在行内公式末尾扩展代码片段时，是否移除尾随空格。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to also remove the closing $ when you delete the opening $ symbol inside blank inline math.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在空白行内公式中删除起始$时，是否同时移除闭合$。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to suppress snippets triggering when an IME is active.")
regex.target: .setDesc("IME（输入法）激活时，是否禁止代码片段触发。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Codeblock languages where the whole code block should be treated like a math block, separated by commas.")
regex.target: .setDesc("需视为数学模式的代码块语言，用逗号分隔。")

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "arrow" element must be an HTMLElement (not an SVGElement)
.error(['Popper: "arrow" modifier\'s `element` must be a child of the popper', "element."].join(" ")

.error(["Popper: The `allowedAutoPlacements` option did not allow any", "placements. Ensure the `placement` option matches the variation", "of the allowed placements.", 'For example, "auto" cannot be used to allow "bottom-start".', 'Use "auto-start" instead.'].join(" ")
regex.target: .error(["Popper：`allowedAutoPlacements`选项未允许任何位置。确保`placement`选项与允许位置的变体匹配。", '例如，"auto"不能用于允许"bottom-start"，请改用"auto-start"。'].join(" ")

regex.source: .error('PopperJS: an invalid property has been provided to the "' + modifier.name + '" modifier, valid properties are ' + VALID_PROPERTIES.map(function(s)
regex.target: .error('PopperJS：向"' + modifier.name + '"修饰符提供了无效属性，有效属性为 ' + VALID_PROPERTIES.map(function(s)

regex.source: .error(['Popper: "auto" placements require the "flip" modifier be', "present and enabled to work."].join(" ")
regex.target: .error(['Popper："auto"位置需要"flip"修饰符存在且启用才能生效。'].join(" ")
